commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a truncated assistant-turn detector, uses it to bypass the incomplete-turn payload-count short circuit, logs truncation context, and adds focused unit coverage.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +106. Total +161 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns null before incomplete-turn assessment when payloadCount is nonzero and stopReason is not toolUse. The full long-running Ollama/auto-compaction live path was not reproduced here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof or an explicit maintainer proof override for a provider terminal-state behavior change; there is no narrow code defect for automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): detect truncated API responses to prevent silent session hang
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89051 — embedded agent sessions silently hanging after a truncated API response with no error logging or recovery.

**Root cause:** When an API stream ends without a proper `finish_reason` (or with `stopReason: "length"`), and the last assistant message contains incomplete/unsigned thinking blocks, `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` bails early at the `payloadCount > 0` guard. This causes the run loop to treat the truncated turn as a successful completion, returning `livenessState: "working"` with no further API calls, no error logs, and no recovery path.

**Fix:** Adds a `isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn` detector that identifies truncated responses (missing/length stopReason + incomplete-thinking assessment from `assessLastAssistantMessage`). This detector:

1. **Bypasses the `payloadCount > 0` short-circuit** in `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` — truncated responses now surface the incomplete-turn error even when partial text was streamed (parallel to existing `toolUseTerminal` guard from #76477)
2. **Extends the terminal detection** gate so truncated responses don't silently pass through when other detectors miss them
3. **Logs a clear warning** in the run loop when truncation is detected, giving operators visibility into what was previously a 14-minute silent window

## Changes

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts`: New `isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn` export + wired into `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` as a bypass guard
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`: Import + log.warn when truncation is detected before the success exit path
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`: 8 new unit tests covering detection + false-positive rejection

## Test plan

- [x] All 120 existing incomplete-turn tests pass (no regressions)
- [x] All 40 overflow-compaction tests pass
- [x] All 6 compaction-loop-guard tests pass
- [x] New tests verify: unsigned thinking + missing stopReason → detected; stopReason=length → detected; valid content + stop → not flagged; toolUse stop → not flagged; null assistant → not flagged
- [x] Integration test verifies: `payloadCount > 0` + truncated response → error surfaced (previously returned null)
- [x] Type-check passes cleanly (`pnpm tsgo`)

## Impact

- **Before:** Truncated API responses after auto-compaction (or any turn) caused the embedded agent to exit silently with `livenessState: "working"`, producing zero gateway logs and leaving sessions stuck indefinitely
- **After:** Truncated turns surface the standard `"⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response"` error with a warn-level log containing provider, model, stopReason, and post-compaction context

— [Joel Nishanth](https://offlyn.ai) · [offlyn.AI](https://offlyn.ai)


## Real behavior proof

This fix is a **defensive detection guard** — it prevents a silent hang by surfacing an error that was previously swallowed. The behavior change is internal to the run loop and only fires when an API stream truncates mid-thinking without a `finish_reason`.

**Unit test proof demonstrating the exact failure path is now caught:**

```
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > detects unsigned/partial thinking with missing stopReason
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > detects unsigned/partial thinking with stopReason=length
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > does not flag normal stop with valid content
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > does not flag toolUse stop reason
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > returns false for null lastAssistant
✓ isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn (#89051) > detects empty content array with missing stopReason
✓ resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText truncation guard (#89051) > surfaces error when payloadCount > 0 but response is truncated
✓ resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText truncation guard (#89051) > still returns null for normal payloadCount > 0 with valid response
```

**Before fix:** `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` returns `null` when `payloadCount > 0` with a truncated response → run exits silently as "working"  
**After fix:** `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` returns the error string → run surfaces `"⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response"` with a `log.warn` containing provider/model/stopReason context

Live reproduction requires a long-running embedded agent with a local Ollama model hitting context overflow + stream truncation — requesting `proof: override` if maintainers consider unit-level proof sufficient for this defensive guard.
target.author: joelnishanth
